© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	I 	www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Launch Summary
▪ 	Will Falconer, DVM - Veterinarian for 35+ years… specialty - homeopathic
medicine
▪ 	Email list: approximately 8,000
▪ 	Existing product: e-book and Audio book bundle for $45 (“Vital Animals Don’t
Get Heartworms!” The Drug Free Prevention Program That Works)
▪ 	Quick Launch: Offered a “nearly 50% off” sale on an e-book/audiobook combo
that had been slowly selling for over a year. Some days one or two sales, some days
none.
▪ 	New bundle: Added (to the e-book and audio book) a bonus Special Report and a one-hour
Q&A webinar.
▪ 	Special offer price: $25
▪ 	Deliver: Sent 6 emails over 4 days - Over the Memorial Day holiday weekend (in the
U.S.)
▪ 	Results: Total Sales: $8845 - 555 total orders
Day 1: 	$ 	875 	- 	35 orders
Day 2: 	$ 1600 - 133 orders
Day 3: 	$ 3550 - 203 orders
Day 4: 	$ 2300 - 141 orders
Day 5: 	$ 	520 - 43 additional orders at full price with no bonuses day after offer
closed

Case Study
MODULE THREE –QUICK LAUNCH case study – will falconer
4
© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	I 	www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Communication Strategy
1. 	Before the Quick Launch…
• 	Shot Across the Bow 1 week before in his regular e-newsletter (small paragraph in full
newsletter)
2. 	Quick Launch - 1st Email
• 	Opening Email: Telling the Story
• 	Sent 6:30 pm on May 28th
• 	Subject line: Unusual Times Call for Unusual Strategies
• 	MAKING IT WORK: “Sent way later than intended due to tech challenges: pages (this
was sent w/o even a landing page!, link was just the coupon!), but TY page, coupon,
new product that RM could track and make members from, and CK could segment.”
3. 	Quick Launch - 2nd Email
• 	Second Email: Regular Newsletter
• 	Sent May 29th at 7:48 pm, so 25 hours after the first email.
• 	Gave a brief recounting and sent interested peeps to a landing page with the first letter
on it
4. 	Quick Launch - 3rd Email
• 	Third Email: Purely marketing
• 	Sent the day after newsletter, plain text only, no logo header even; sent May 30th,
8:30 am, when he *thought* he’d close at midnight.
• 	(“That changed, thanks to a friend for the inspiration that closing on Memorial Day
was dumb.”)
5. 	Quick Launch - 4th Email
• 	Fourth Email: “Last Call”
• 	Sent 5:30 pm May 30th
• 	Subject line: Courtesy Alert: Closing Soon
• 	(This is when he *thought* he was closing that night, “but stayed tuned. Remember
Jeff: “When you’re in the launch, you can change things!”)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Pre-Prelaunch Example
SHOT ACROSS THE BOW
(Small Paragraph in regular newsletter 1 week before quick launch)
Big Things Brewing
I've been re-examining what I'm up to on this planet we call home. I realized very recently
that it's time to up my game. Got to take this Vital Animal/Natural Path message past the
tin cans on a string that it sometimes feels like I'm stuck in.
Why aren't more folks tuning in on this important work? You pack members are, and I so
appreciate that, but there's still way too many animals and their people stuck in the
conventional medical machine. It's eating them up and tearing their animals' health to
pieces.
There'll be some cool goodness coming your way about this next weekend. Please keep an
eye out. Probably long about Saturday, the way things look…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Case Study
MODULE THREE –QUICK LAUNCH case study – will falconer
7
© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	I 	www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Prelaunch ExampleS
Email #1
Subject Line: Unusual Times Call for Unusual Strategies
Hey Vital Animal Pack Peeps,
This is a bit unusual. Instead of writing my usual newsletter (coming tomorrow, no
worries), I wanted to share a story that kept me up for the better part of the night recently.
As many of you likely know, Big Pharma tried to make VitalAnimal.com go dark recently. In
common parlance, this is called hacking or cyber-attacks. And the site did go down,
repeatedly, over several days. All this was happening after I blogged on Apoquel, the Pfizer
drug that’s selling like hot cakes for itchy dogs. That article was getting thousands upon
thousands of page views and climbed to the top of Google when folks typed in the drug’s
name.
There was little old me, on page one of the search results, with the headline Apoquel: Dog
Drug With a Dark Side just a few spots beneath Big Pharma’s pitches for that drug. It’s still
getting a ton of visits.
(The site is fully up and running since my web host doubled down on security, by the way.
It’s been serving thousands of visitors 24/7 for the past few weeks.)
Tip Toe or Leap?
All this was also happening on a weekend while I was away, dipping my toes into bigger,
bolder ideas at a recent business conference in Phoenix. Brilliant people both presenting
and in attendance, who were taking their message to a far larger audience than I, helping
far more people improve their lives, solve problems, and create brighter futures.
When I got a chance to stand and relay a personal “ah-ha moment” from the conference, on
a live mic in front of 900+ people, it was about you and how Dr. WhiteCoat often denies
your hard work and study on behalf of your animals.
I literally got choked up telling it, I was so moved.
Well that dip turned into a plunge. I decided then and there that I had to up my game. I had
to help more people struggling with the push from Big Pharma and its henchmen to market
dangerous drugs and vaccines. It was obvious to me that the bottom line in way too many
veterinary practices had finally eclipsed the reason we all got into this profession originally:
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

to help the animals.
That profit-driven bottom line was negating your many stories of damage caused by drugs
and vaccines. Real people with real sick animals having no voice. And facing a long struggle
and huge expense to get their animals out of the quicksand of chronic disease these drugs
had dropped them into.
In deciding to go bigger, I put my credit card down to pay for additional training. The most
expensive training I’ve ever signed up for in my life. Close to four years of vet school in
comparison.
But, I know I have to do this, expense be damned. This message of how to avoid all the
unnecessary damage to your animals must reach around the world and back again. Real,
true prevention has to be taught, and it’s very, very different than what is being pushed on
you all every day. Too many animals are suffering from that push.
I realize I’m not alone here. Many of you share my vision of changing the world, one Vital
Animal at a time, and have already set the bar higher for those with animals around you.
Having you by my side makes such a difference! Together, we can educate, enlighten and
enlist others who are just like you.
Taking It To the World Sale!
To get that ball rolling, I decided I have to raise some capital. That credit card bill will soon
need to be paid, and hiring needs to get underway and tools need to be bought. I decided to
do something unusual (and, of course, helpful) and I’m putting my well received drug free
heartworm prevention protocol on sale.
Many of you have used this method for years to great success, and have created brilliant,
naturally heartworm resistant dogs and cats by following it. I thank you and congratulate
you for stepping out of the dangerous paradigm of fear based prevention with risky drugs,
like Trifexis and others.
So, here’s the deal. If you don’t yet have Vital Animals Don’t Get Heartworms! [The Drug
Free Prevention Program That Works] you’ll now be able to get the best package I offer
(ebook plus audiobook) at a great discount. It normally sells for $45, and for the next few
days, I’m offering it for only $25. That’s the cost of the book itself, normally.
Nearly a 50% discount. But it goes away Monday the 30th (Memorial Day in the U.S.) at
midnight CT.
I’m also offering a Big Bonus for all who buy in. Bundled with this package deal is a one

(Addition to regular newsletter)
Article Subject: Big Things Underway
As promised, I let you Pack Peeps in on my big plans yesterday. Taking this Vital Animal |
Natural Path to the world!
To get that ball rolling (and to help me pay for phase I, a very big training in how to
influence and promote this message on a much grander scale), yesterday saw the Taking It
To The World Sale launched.
In a nutshell, I'm offering a deep discount on my Vital Animals Don't Get
Heartworms ebook and audiobook combination. You can, for a very short time, get this
combo for only $25, nearly a 50% off sale.
And, I'm sweetening the pot with a couple of nice bonuses: a PDF report on
my Homeopathic Detox Protocol, and a one hour live webinar solely to answer any
and all questions you have about heartworm.
If you've just joined us since that email went out, you can go to this page and see a copy
of it and get the full story.
This ends at midnight Central Time, U.S. tomorrow night, the 30th of May. I don't expect
the price to ever be this low again, so take full advantage and grab your bonuses before the
deadline tomorrow.
Thanks to all of you who've taken advantage of this offer and offered your encouragement!

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. 	I 	www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Email #5
Subject Line: Duh. Just Duh.
I don't know what I was thinking. Luckily, I've got smart voices in my Pack and in my
sphere of friends. Voices of wisdom that make me go, "Damn. Why did I do that?"
Such voices with greater wisdom than I said, "Why are you shutting down your very special
sale, the one that's aimed at getting your important Vital Animal message to circle the globe
and reach a far wider audience, why would you shut that down on a holiday?"
She was right, this amalgam of wiser voices.
"Don't you know that most real people, in the U.S. at least, were outdoors all day yesterday,
away from email and computers? It was time to be out with their dogs and horses and sure,
why not, their cats?
Duh. Just duh.
That's what happens on a holiday. You get together with family, friends, and your animals
and get out of the humdrum.
Pure oversight to close a sale like this, and one with such a lofty goal, when 57% of you all
likely missed the alerts because you were doing what people do on a holiday.
Okay, so, I came to my senses. And extended the deadline to get on board and get this time
tested method to keep heartworms away from your dog and cat without poisoning them,
and to get it at a deep discount.
To recap, for a mere $25, you get:
• 	My 50 page ebook, Vital Animals Don't Get Heartworms!
• 	The Audiobook version of the same, so you can take it with you on your phone.
• 	My bonus report, Homeopathic Detox Protocol, to start undoing the poisons given
earlier, in a safe, easy, deep acting way.
• 	And an hour long live webinar with me, where I'll answer your questions about
heartworm and everything related to it.
That's a lot of helpful goodness for what's normally the cost of the book alone. Here's the
coupon to take advantage of this, until midnight tonight: (duh)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
